summary: Matched a large portion of sysdolphin baselib displayfunc code, especially JObj display traversal, position-matrix generation, z-list allocation/sorting/display/clear paths, erase-rect rendering setup, SPtcl callback plumbing, and related display headers. The PR also moved vector API aliases/prototypes from the broad dolphin/mtx.h header into dolphin/mtx/vec.h and updated users to include vec.h directly. The author explicitly noted that mkBillboardMtx, mkVBillboardMtx, and mkHBillboardMtx remained unmatched/not implemented, while mkRBillBoardMtx was matched and intended as a reference point.
what_changed: Expanded src/sysdolphin/baselib/displayfunc.c by roughly 486 added lines, replacing a small stub-like body with matched implementations and static globals for display and z-list state.
Added z-list allocation/free helpers using HSD_ObjAlloc/HSD_ObjFree and zeroing the allocated list body with memset.
Implemented JObj position matrix generation via HSD_JObjMakePositionMtx, including dispatch on JOBJ_BILLBOARD_FIELD and a matched mkRBillBoardMtx path.
Left mkBillBoardMtx, mkVBillBoardMtx, and mkHBillBoardMtx as NOT_IMPLEMENTED, matching the PR body's note that these billboard variants were still unresolved.
Added HSD_JObjFindSkeleton and _HSD_mkEnvelopeModelNodeMtx logic for skeleton/envelope matrix handling.
Added HSD_JObjDispSub, HSD_JObjDispDObj, and HSD_JObjDisp for display traversal, transparency-mask handling, DObj dispatch, z-sort listing behavior, and particle callback handling.
Added _HSD_ZListSort, _HSD_ZListDisp, _HSD_ZListClear, and _HSD_DispForgetMemory for transparent/texedge display-list sorting and cleanup.
Added HSD_JObjSetSPtclCallback, HSD_SetEraseColor, and HSD_EraseRect display utility functions.
Changed HSD_StateInitDirect to use named GX enum constants instead of numeric literals for vertex attributes, descriptors, formats, and current matrix setup.

Updated displayfunc.h with transparency shift constants, JOBJ_OPA/JOBJ_XLU/JOBJ_TEXEDGE bit constants, typed HSD_TrspMask parameter usage, u8 erase-color parameters, int erase-rect enable flags, and the SPtcl callback setter declaration.
Moved VECCrossProduct, VECSubtract, and VECNormalize aliases/prototypes out of src/dolphin/mtx.h and into src/dolphin/mtx/vec.h alongside VECAdd, VECScale, VECMag, and VECDotProduct aliases.
Updated lbcollision.c and lbvector.c to include <dolphin/mtx/vec.h> directly after vector macros/prototypes were moved out of <dolphin/mtx.h>.
Added supporting baselib/GX/Runtime includes needed by the new displayfunc.c implementations.
smart_moves: Separated vector declarations into dolphin/mtx/vec.h and updated direct users, reducing implicit dependency on the broader dolphin/mtx.h header.
Replaced magic GX numeric constants in HSD_StateInitDirect with named GX_VA_POS, GX_VA_CLR0, GX_POS_XYZ, GX_RGBA8, GX_DIRECT, and GX_PNMTX0 constants, making future matching and review easier.
Kept unresolved billboard functions explicitly marked NOT_IMPLEMENTED rather than forcing weak or speculative matches.

Documented in the PR body that the remaining billboard functions differ from later games and that mkRBillBoardMtx-generated output should be used as a reference, giving future workers a concrete starting point.
Used separate linked-list heads/bottom pointers and counters for texedge and xlu z-lists, reflecting the underlying display ordering model.
Centralized z-list cleanup in _HSD_ZListClear and called it after _HSD_ZListDisp, preventing retained allocated matrix/list state.
Used HSD_TrspMask in displayfunc.h rather than a raw u32 flags parameter, improving semantic type information without changing the low-level bitmask behavior.
decomp_lessons: When a broad platform header accidentally exposes vector helpers, moving aliases/prototypes to the narrower vec.h can require adding explicit includes in existing users; this is useful header hygiene for decomp projects.
Use named SDK/GX constants where available to replace raw numeric values; this preserves codegen intent while making matched code more maintainable.
It is acceptable to land a partial displayfunc match if unresolved functions are isolated and clearly marked, especially when the PR body names the remaining functions and why they are hard.

For HSD display code, transparency handling spans both JObj flags and DObj flags; preserving shift constants such as DOBJ_TRSP_SHIFT and JOBJ_TRSP_SHIFT makes this relationship searchable and less error-prone.

Z-sort lists can be represented as multiple intrusive linked lists over the same allocation; offsets or offsetof-style access may be necessary to match generated code, but hardcoded offsets should be marked for later cleanup.
Matrix-related display matching often depends on exact ownership and lifetime of allocated matrices, such as copying vmtx into HSD_MtxAlloc storage only when queuing z-sorted display entries.
Do not assume later-game baselib billboard code will match Melee; the PR body says these billboard functions are substantially different from later versions.
naming_conventions: HSD_ZList allocation helpers use HSD_ZListAlloc and HSD_ZListFree naming.
Internal z-list routines use leading underscores: _HSD_ZListSort, _HSD_ZListDisp, _HSD_ZListClear.
Display forget-memory hook is named _HSD_DispForgetMemory with parameters renamed to lo and hi.
SPtcl callback setter is named HSD_JObjSetSPtclCallback.
JObj display helpers follow HSD_JObjDisp, HSD_JObjDispDObj, and HSD_JObjDispSub naming.
Billboard helpers in this slice use mkBillBoardMtx, mkVBillBoardMtx, mkHBillBoardMtx, and mkRBillBoardMtx spelling; note the capitalized Board in the function names shown in the diff.
Vector macro aliases mirror SDK-style names mapped to paired-single implementations, such as VECCrossProduct -> PSVECCrossProduct and VECNormalize -> PSVECNormalize.
Transparency bit constants introduced in displayfunc.h use JOBJ_OPA, JOBJ_XLU, JOBJ_TEXEDGE, DOBJ_TRSP_SHIFT, and JOBJ_TRSP_SHIFT.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used NOT_IMPLEMENTED placeholders for mkBillBoardMtx, mkVBillBoardMtx, and mkHBillBoardMtx to keep the matched surrounding display code landed without pretending the unresolved assembly was understood.

Matched mkRBillBoardMtx by deriving scale from source matrix column magnitudes via HSD_MtxColMag, building a scale matrix, applying a Z rotation from jobj->rotate.z, copying translation components, and concatenating rotation and scale.
Matched z-list sorting with a recursive merge sort over intrusive linked-list fields selected by byte offsets, including a TODO to replace hardcoded 0x3C and 0x40 offsets with an offsetof macro.
Preserved apparent codegen-sensitive details such as the local padding array `u8 _[4];` in HSD_EraseRect and a specifically sized aligned static depth_image array.
Used explicit GX immediate-mode calls in HSD_EraseRect, including GXBegin/GXPosition3f32/GXColor4u8/GXTexCoord2u8/GXEnd, to reproduce the erase-rectangle render path.
Used bitmask tests and shifts rather than higher-level abstractions in HSD_JObjDispDObj, likely to preserve the original flag layout and generated control flow.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR context.
The PR body states that mkBillboardMtx, mkVBillboardMtx, and mkHBillboardMtx were still lacking.

The PR body notes that these remaining billboard functions are unlike later versions used in other games, so future matching should reference generated output from the matched mkRBillBoardMtx instead of assuming cross-game equivalence.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that implement mkBillBoardMtx, mkVBillBoardMtx, or mkHBillBoardMtx.
Search for TODOs replacing hardcoded z-list sort offsets 0x3C and 0x40 with offsetof.
Search for further cleanup of dolphin/mtx.h versus dolphin/mtx/vec.h include boundaries.
Look for reviews or later changes touching HSD_EraseRect enable_color/enable_alpha/enable_depth parameter types.
Compare mkRBillBoardMtx in this PR with generated assembly notes or baselib versions from other games.
